subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Fitnih (Tablet of the Test)
subcodes.first_line: O Enchantment of eternity! Await thou the Enchantment of God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, for verily it shall come unto you with truth. Lo, it hath [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا فتنه البقا فانتظری فتنه الله المهیمن القیوم بانها سیاتیکم بالحق فها قد
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
